title: Trudoc Beskid grammar support

source.subject: feat(trudoc): add Beskid grammar support and update package configuration

body:
## What shipped

Trudoc gains Beskid grammar highlighting/validation for fenced code blocks in book and platform-spec content.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `e679792`

> feat(trudoc): add Beskid grammar support and update package configuration

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
